careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Team fuɗɓaade e Chatforia — messenger suraɓe, global. E suraɓe, encryption, e experience kesal, ɓeydu-ɓeydu.
careers.openRoles: Role fuɗɓaade: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Ko a apply: Nodda resume e link e button ɓeydu-ɓeydu.
careers.whyBullets:
• Sos foundation e messenger global kesal.
• Ship feature e web, iOS, Android.
